[ 01 — THE SHOP ]

We don't guess. We diagnose, photograph it, and tell you straight.

Every car gets shot during inspection — so you see exactly what we see before you approve a dime of work. No mystery charges, no parts you didn't need.

Fifteen years in the same bays. Our techs train on the same diagnostic platforms the dealerships run. We just pick up the phone faster and charge you less for it.

[ 02 ]

The work

01DiagnosticsFactory scan tools. Real answers, not guesses.
02Brakes & RotorsPads, rotors, fluid. Free check every visit.
03Tires & AlignmentMount, balance, laser 4-wheel alignment.
04Oil & FluidsFull-synthetic + free multi-point inspection.
05SuspensionStruts, shocks, steering, dialed to spec.
06MaintenanceFactory intervals that protect your warranty.
[ 03 ]

Why us

01

Straight quotes

Written, photo-backed, before we touch the car. The quote is the price. Period.

02

Real diagnostics

Dealer-grade tools so we kill the cause once — not the symptom twice.

03

Free loaners

On most longer jobs, so your day doesn't stop when your car does.

04

3yr / 36k warranty

Parts and labor, covered nationwide. Drive easy.

05

ASE-certified

Master techs current on hybrids, turbos, modern electronics.

06

No upsells

We flag what's coming, fix what's due. Never invent work.

[ 04 ]

How it runs

1

Book it

Online or call. Tell us the symptoms; we plan the visit around them.

2

See the diagnosis

We inspect, photograph, and send a written estimate. Nothing happens till you say go.

3

Drive away covered

Fixed right, on time, with a 3-year warranty riding shotgun.

[ 07 ]

Straight answers

Do you work on my ride?+

Domestic, Asian, and most European makes — including hybrids and turbos. If we can't help, we'll point you to someone who can.

Will service void my factory warranty?+

No. Independent shops can do scheduled maintenance without affecting your manufacturer warranty, and we document it all.

Do I get a quote first?+

Always. Written, photo-backed estimate — and we don't start until you approve it.

How long does it take?+

Many jobs are same-day. For longer ones, free loaner cars so you're never stranded.

What's the warranty?+

3 years / 36,000 miles on parts and labor, honored nationwide.
